---
title: "Research"
toc: true 

---

## Peer-Reviewed Publications

Cruz-Jiménez, Lizeth, Kevin A. Carson, James F. Thrasher, Katia Gallegos-Carrillo, Dèsirée Vidaña-Pérez, Diego F. Leal. 2026. “Social Network Determinants of Cigarette Forgoing and Quit-Related Conversations in a 15-Day Ecological Momentary Assessment Study in Mexico and the US.” *Tobacco Use Insights* 19: 1-12.[[pdf](https://journals.sagepub.com/doi/epdf/10.1177/1179173X261430211)]


Carson, Kevin A. 2025. “Coyotaje in an Uncertain Social Environment: Prior Coyote Experience as a Form of Migration-Specific Human Capital.” *Journal of Ethnic and Migration Studies* 1–22. [[pdf](https://www.tandfonline.com/doi/full/10.1080/1369183X.2025.2592627)] [[code](https://github.com/kevinCarson/Coyote_Use_JEMS_2025)]

## Conference Presentations

**Carson, Kevin**  (with [Diego F. Leal](https://www.diegoleal.info/), Jeffrey Shen, [David R. Schaefer](https://sites.google.com/site/drschaef/home), and [Olov Aronson](https://www.kau.se/en/researchers/olov-aronson)). 2025. “Tie Creation and Maintenance and the Link Between Adolescent Depression and Withdrawal in Friendship Networks”, American Sociological Association 120th Annual Meeting, Chicago, Illinois, USA.

**Carson, Kevin**  (with [Diego F. Leal](https://www.diegoleal.info/)). 2025. “Relational Outcome Models: Some Monte Carlo Results”,  American Sociological Association 120th Annual Meeting, Chicago, Illinois, USA.

**Carson, Kevin** (with [Diego F. Leal](https://www.diegoleal.info/)). 2024. “A Framework for Efficient Computation of Sufficient Statistics in Relational Event Models (REM) Applied to Large Two-Mode Networks”, American Sociological Association 119th Annual Meeting, Montreal, Quebec, Canada.

**Carson, Kevin** (with [Diego F. Leal](https://www.diegoleal.info/)). 2024. “Exploring the Social Dynamics of Undocumented Border Crossings: A Study on Coyote Use and Prior Coyote Experience”, American Sociological Association 119th Annual Meeting, Montreal, Quebec, Canada.

**Carson, Kevin** (with [Diego F. Leal](https://www.diegoleal.info/)). 2023. “Political Use of Social Media and Offline Protest Participation: Consistent Estimates from Three Different Population-based Surveys in the U.S”, American Sociological Association 118th Annual Meeting, Philadelphia, USA.

**Carson, Kevin**. 2021. “Political Usage of Social Media: A Quantitative Study on Protest Participation and Mobilization”, Mid-South Sociological Association Conference, virtual meeting.


## Open-Source Statistical Software 
**Carson, Kevin** and [Diego F. Leal](https://www.diegoleal.info/). 2025. **[dream: Dynamic Relational Event Analysis and Modeling](https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/dream/index.html)**. R package version 0.1.0. 
<a href="https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/dream/index.html">
  <img src="https://cranlogs.r-pkg.org/badges/grand-total/dream" alt="CRAN downloads">
</a>
</p>
